headline: Phillips 66 to Host Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: HOUSTON, May 04, 2026--Phillips 66 will host its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Wednesday, May 13 at 8 a.m. CT.

raw.summary: HOUSTON, May 04, 2026--Phillips 66 will host its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Wednesday, May 13 at 8 a.m. CT.

headline: Valero Energy: A Repeat Of The Mega-Cycle From 2022
summary: Valero Energy is structurally advantaged due to the Strait of Hormuz closure, enabling superior access to crude. See why VLO stock is upgraded to a buy.
